justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* imports to jakarta.* and updates dependencies (Spring Boot 2.6 -> 3.3, Hibernate 5.6 -> 6.5, Java 11 -> 21), but it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads). The dependency updates are appropriate for Jakarta EE, though the diff introduces a duplicate jakarta.persistence-api dependency (lines 44-48 and 94-98 in pom.xml) and removes hibernate-entitymanager without adding hibernate-jpa-2.1-api or equivalent, which may cause runtime issues. The diff is coherent but has minor structural issues.
